error_signature: Import of standard library module ‘json’ is disallowed
title: Python task runner disallows standard and external libraries
symptom: The Python task runner throws errors indicating that imports for standard library modules and external packages are disallowed.
applies_when: Custom task runner configuration is set
not_this_if: Using default configuration without custom task runner settings
root_cause: The Python task runner is not loading the custom configuration file due to a filename mismatch. As a result, it defaults to a sandbox mode that restricts access to standard and external libraries.
fix_steps: Rename the configuration file path in the Dockerfile to /etc/n8n-task-runners.json.
Rebuild the runner image using 'docker compose build n8n-runner'.
Start the updated runner with 'docker compose up -d'.
Check the runner logs to ensure the custom task runner config is loaded.
agent_instruction: Rename the configuration file in the Dockerfile and rebuild the runner image.
